title: "Chunyu Gu"
image: images/profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/gugu-12
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:gu.1204@buckeyemail.osu.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/Chunyu Gu
---

## About Me

I am the second year student in mathmatics at The Ohio State University.
I work in the Car Mobility lab on data collection and analysis.

## Research Interests

- Machine learning
- AI

## Education

- **[Degree]** applied math, The Ohio State University, the second year
